additionalInfo.description: Aggregate news from multiple RSS sources, generate AI-powered summaries, and format them into a readable digest.

inputSchema.name: feed_url
inputSchema.description: The RSS feed URL to aggregate news from

additionalInfo.description: Fetch the latest news items from the RSS feed

configuration.prompt:
You are a news editor. Summarize the following news articles into a concise daily digest.

For each article, provide:
1. A one-line headline
2. A 2-3 sentence summary
3. A relevance tag (e.g., Technology, Business, Industry, Policy)

Group articles by their relevance tag. At the top, include a "Top Stories" section with the 3 most important articles.

Articles:
${msg}

additionalInfo.description: Generate AI-powered summaries of news articles
Format the digest with headers, dates, and styling
